name: wangtsaiti
introMiddle: a designer supporting early-stage tech innovation at
status: Currently — shaping product & design for early-stage teams
aboutParagraphs: I'm a designer who's happiest in the messy early middle of a problem — where the brief is vague, the constraints keep moving, and the job is to make something clear out of all of it.
Right now I'm at Orthogonal Supersystems, helping early-stage tech move from idea to something people can actually use. I care about craft, calm interfaces, and shipping.
contactLede: Have a problem worth untangling? I'd love to hear about it.
